title: NCWS Visits SEC: Promoting Women Empowerment and Financial Inclusion - FinancialEDGE
description: The visit by the National Council for Women Society (NCWS) to the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) highlights the importance of promoting women's empowerment and financial inclusion in Nigeria. html:
The visit by the National Council for Women Society (NCWS) to the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) highlights the importance of promoting women’s empowerment and financial inclusion in Nigeria.

The meeting between NCWS President Princess Edna D.D Azura and SEC’s Executive Commissioners, Ms Frana Chukwuogor and Mrs Samiya Hassan Usman, underscores the commitment to fostering collaboration and development in the financial sector.

 

Photo Caption: Left to Right: Executive Commissioner, Legal and Enforcement, Securities and Exchange Commission, Ms Frana Chukwuogor, President National Council for Women Society, Princess Edna D.D Azura and Edecutive Commissioner Corporate Services SEC,  Mrs Samiya Hassan Usman during a visit by the  National Council for Women Society (NCWS), Nigeria to the Commission.
